title: platostoma rubrum
intro: Platostoma rubrum, also known as red platostoma, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Platostoma rubrum include relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
